Notes: Probe whether delete_rr of a non-existent member inside an existing RRset is treated as idempotent success or as an update failure when the rrset_exists prerequisite is satisfied.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite confirms the A RRset exists at absentrr.campus.edu.; then attempt to delete a specific A RR that is not present.

Steps.Name: absentrr.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset remains unchanged after the UPDATE attempt.
